name: Raphael (2012)
description: He is the most violent of the four brothers. A straight-up brawler, he has very little patience for things like stealth, hiding in shadows, or keeping his voice down. While he's fiercely loyal to his brothers, he's also often the one giving them a hard time. Raphael is also the one most likely to strike out on his own when he feels slighted or underappreciated. Raphael's temper can get the better of him, causing him to get into situations over his head.
creator: burntcandy
